children.text: if such election was made due to negligence or disregard of the rules or regulations, there shall be imposed a penalty of $500, or
if such election was made due to fraud, there shall be imposed a penalty of $1,000.

children.heading: Eligible child
children.label: 1 Eligible child
children.text: The term “eligible child” has the meaning given such term under section 6434.

children.heading: Negligence; disregard
children.label: 2 Negligence; disregard
children.text: The terms “negligence” and “disregard” have the same meaning as when such terms are used in section 6662.
